tags.name: Server Users
tags.description: Server user management endpoints (secret key auth)

tags.name: Server Sessions
tags.description: Server session management endpoints (secret key auth)

post.description: Creates an end-user in your environment. All body fields are optional; supply at minimum an email if you want the user to be able to sign in via email + password.

400.description: Invalid body (e.g. weak password, malformed email).

409.description: Another user with this email already exists in the environment.

post.description: Reverses a previous ban. The user can sign in again on next request.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: Identifier of the user to unban.

403.description: User belongs to a different environment.

post.description: Marks the user as banned and revokes all their active sessions.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: Identifier of the user to ban.

403.description: User belongs to a different environment.

post.description: Returns a cursor-paginated page of end-users in the environment matching the optional filters. Filters use the same tri-state PATCH semantics as `UpdateUserRequest`: omit a field to skip that filter, send a value to require it, send null to require null. Uses POST so the filter body can be sent without URL-encoding.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of items in the returned page (default 20).

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque cursor returned by the previous page's `nextCursor`. Omit to fetch the first page.

get.description: Returns the full profile for one end-user.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: Identifier of the user to fetch.

403.description: User belongs to a different environment.

delete.description: Soft-deletes the user. Idempotent: returns 204 even if the user was already deleted.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: Identifier of the user to delete.

403.description: User belongs to a different environment.

patch.description: Partial update with tri-state PATCH semantics. Every field in `UpdateUserRequest` is tri-state: omit the key to leave the field unchanged, send a non-null value to set it, or send JSON null to clear it.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: Identifier of the user to update.

403.description: User belongs to a different environment.

get.description: Returns all active (unexpired, unrevoked) sessions for the user, ordered by most recently used.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: Identifier of the user whose sessions to list.

200.description: All active sessions for the user.

403.description: User belongs to a different environment.

delete.description: Immediately revokes every active session for the user. Idempotent.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: Identifier of the user whose sessions to revoke.

403.description: User belongs to a different environment.

delete.description: Revokes a single session by id. Idempotent: returns 204 even if the session was already revoked or expired.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: Identifier of the user who owns the session.

parameters.name: sessionId
parameters.description: Identifier of the session to revoke.

403.description: User or session belongs to a different environment.

CreateUserRequest.description: Request body for creating an end-user in your environment. All fields are optional; supply at minimum an email if you want the user to be able to sign in via email + password.

email.description: Primary email for the new user. If omitted, the user is created without a sign-in identity.

password.description: Initial password. Subject to the environment's password policy. Omit to create a passwordless user (e.g. social-only).

name.description: Display name to seed on the profile.

phone.description: Phone number to seed on the profile.

address.description: Postal address to seed on the profile.

UserResponse.description: An end-user belonging to one of your environments.

environmentId.description: Identifier of the environment this user belongs to.

name.description: Full name on the profile, if any.

phone.description: Phone number on the profile, if any. Not guaranteed to be verified.

avatarUrl.description: URL of the user's avatar image, if any.

locale.description: Preferred locale for emails and UI messages.

dateOfBirth.description: Date of birth in ISO-8601 (YYYY-MM-DD), if provided.

status.description: Lifecycle status of the user (e.g. active, banned).

createdAt.description: When this user was created (ISO-8601 UTC).

updatedAt.description: When this user was last modified (ISO-8601 UTC).

email.description: Primary email on the profile, if any. Not guaranteed to be verified.

deletedAt.description: When this user was deleted, if soft-deleted. Null for active users.

ServerUserSearchRequest.description: Optional filter body for `POST /users/search`. Every field is tri-state: omit to skip that filter, send a value to require it, send JSON null to require null.

name.description: Filter by name (exact match). Send null to require users with no name.

email.description: Filter by primary email (exact match). Send null to require users with no email.

statuses.description: Filter by user status. Returns users matching any of the supplied statuses.

createdAfter.description: Only return users created at or after this instant (ISO-8601 UTC).

createdBefore.description: Only return users created at or before this instant (ISO-8601 UTC).

CursorPageResponseUserResponse.description: A single page of results in a cursor-paginated list. Pass `nextCursor` as the `cursor` query parameter to fetch the following page.

items.description: Items in this page, in stable order.

nextCursor.description: Cursor to pass to fetch the next page. Null when this is the last page.

hasMore.description: True if more pages are available (equivalent to `nextCursor != null`).

UpdateUserRequest.description: PATCH body for updating an end-user. Every field is tri-state: omit the key entirely to leave the field unchanged, send a non-null value to set it, or send JSON null to clear it.

name.description: New display name. Send null to clear; omit to leave unchanged.

phone.description: New phone number. Send null to clear; omit to leave unchanged.

avatarUrl.description: New avatar URL. Send null to clear; omit to leave unchanged.

locale.description: New preferred locale. Send null to clear; omit to leave unchanged.

address.description: New postal address. Send null to clear; omit to leave unchanged.

dateOfBirth.description: New date of birth (YYYY-MM-DD). Send null to clear; omit to leave unchanged.

UserSessionResponse.description: An active end-user session in your environment.

userId.description: Identifier of the end-user this session belongs to.

environmentId.description: Identifier of the environment this session belongs to.

userAgent.description: Raw User-Agent string captured when the session was created.
userAgent.example: Mozilla/5.0 (Macintosh; Intel Mac OS X 14_6_0) AppleWebKit/537.36

ipAddress.description: IP address captured when the session was created.

createdAt.description: When this session was created (ISO-8601 UTC).

lastUsedAt.description: When this session was last seen by the API (ISO-8601 UTC).
